name: 1.5 Flathub Tutorial
author: zapamitany123
description: Updated fan-made tutorial world with 2 new zones. Map is surrounded by flat world and is perfect for survival series!
extended_description:
Added 2 new zones (spruce forest and desert)
Minecart ride, ancient tomb and cozy watchtower.

I put my heart into this world and I plan to update it again soon!
